task_completion.description: Verify that the initial junk rows have been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Row 1 should now contain the column headers ('Name', 'Email', 'Registration Date', 'Ticket Type', 'Dietary Restrictions'). The text 'Exported from FormSubmit Pro...' and 'Total Registrations: 46' should no longer be visible at the top.

task_completion.description: Verify that the header row has been formatted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the header row (Row 1) should be visually distinct from the data rows, typically by being bolded, having a different font size, or having a background color.

task_completion.description: Verify that the columns have been auto-fitted to their content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The columns (A through E) should be wide enough so that all text is fully visible. Pay special attention to 'Registration Date', 'Dietary Restrictions', and email addresses, which should no longer be cut off or overflowing.

task_completion.description: Verify that the top pane (header row) is frozen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be a distinct, slightly thicker horizontal line directly below Row 1 (or the header row), indicating that the freeze panes feature is active.

integrity.description: Verify that a spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) was used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a graphical spreadsheet application interface, not a terminal or plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the underlying data was not destroyed or altered.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data rows should still contain realistic names, emails (firstname.lastname@email.com), dates, ticket types, and dietary restrictions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original file contained 4 junk rows at the top, followed by headers (Name, Email, Registration Date, Ticket Type, Dietary Restrictions) and 46 data rows. Initially, all columns were 0.7 inches wide, causing text to be cut off. The goal is to have the headers in Row 1, formatted (e.g., bold), with columns wide enough to show all text, and Row 1 frozen.
